subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! The letter dated the seventh of Ramadan of this year, which thou didst address to Jinab-i-Áqá Siyyid Asadu'lláh [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه هفتم رمضان سنه حالیه که به جناب آقا سید اسدالله مرقوم
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
